PAYS DE RETZ ENERGIES — System Network Administrator

profile._comment: Один файл: настройки MoneyClock (v:1) + вложенный profile. Импорт: Настройки → Загрузить JSON. Ставки и проекты правьте в форме ниже; резюме — в JSON или внешнем редакторе.

personal.headline: Software Engineering Lead | Java | Kotlin | Scala | Python | AI
personal.availability: Open for remote B2B contracts across EU & UK

profile.summary: Software Engineer with 16+ years of experience designing and delivering mission-critical enterprise systems across banking (AML), retail POS, logistics, GIS, and air traffic control. Combines deep backend engineering expertise with AI-driven automation and cloud-native architectures.

certifications.name: Oracle Certified Professional, Java SE 8 Programmer I (OCP)

profile.technicalStackSummary: Scala, Java, Kotlin, Python, TypeScript • REST, OpenAPI 3.0, Swagger, OAuth2, JWT • Terraform, Helm, Kubernetes, Docker • Azure, AWS, GCP • Kafka, PostgreSQL, Cassandra, Elasticsearch • Grafana, OpenTelemetry, Jaeger

apiIntegration: Strong expertise in REST fundamentals and API design best practices including resource modeling, pagination, versioning, and error semantics.

Extensive hands-on experience with OpenAPI 3.0 Specification, API Standards & Patterns (Request/Response envelopes, HATEOAS, Idempotency, Circuit Breakers), and Swagger-driven contract-first development.
Designed and maintained secure, scalable APIs integrated with OAuth2 / JWT / Azure AD authorization and custom gateway policies.
cloudDevOps: Hands-on experience with Azure (App Service, AKS, Service Bus, Blob Storage), AWS (EC2, Bedrock, SageMaker), and GCP (VertexAI, Gemini).
Proficient in IaC and CI/CD: Terraform, Helm, Kubernetes, Docker, Azure DevOps, GitHub Actions.
Observability-driven approach using Grafana, ELK Stack, Application Insights, OpenTelemetry.
aiLlmEngineering: Integrated OpenAI, Gemini, and LangChain models into enterprise backends via FastAPI and streaming endpoints, including semantic search with Redis Vector DB and FAISS.
coreStrengths: Architecting scalable, maintainable backend systems with strong testing discipline
Leading agile teams focused on reliability, security, and maintainability
Driving innovation through AI/LLM and backend convergence
Delivering systems built to last, secure, observable, and evolvable

experience.title: Software Engineering Lead
description: Spearheading the design and implementation of anti-money laundering (AML) compliance solutions for global financial institutions.
Designed distributed architectures with synchronous (API REST) and asynchronous (Kafka, MQ) integrations.
Worked on Scala Play Framework, Kotlin Ktor, and Spring Boot-based microservices and secured APIs with OAuth2 and SSL certificates.

AI Systems Expertise (2024–2025): AI-powered assistants and LLM-integrated backend services — OpenAI (GPT-4, function calling, embeddings), Gemini (google-genai client), LangChain, FastAPI streaming (WebSockets, SSE), prompt engineering with Jinja2, embeddings (FAISS, Redis vector search), LLM profiling and context memory, A/B testing and explainability.

experience.title: Founder
description: Founder & CEO of SkillTools, driving innovation in AI and software engineering.
Launched and scaled ventures including Expatria.ai (AI relocation assistant), Dealio.rs (secure escrow marketplace), and Trestor.ai (AI for creative operations).
Focused on AI in banking (KYC/AML), aviation systems, and enterprise automation; leading cross-border teams from concept to production.

experience.title: Software Engineering Manager
description: Led team developing self-service checkout solutions using Java, C, and Spring; technical mentorship; JPOS and IoT integration.

experience.title: Lead Software Engineer
description: Led team of 3-5 developers in banking software with Spring Boot, React, Oracle DB.
Software architecture and delivery; Elasticsearch and Hadoop for big data; Spring Batch for ETL.

experience.title: Software Technical Lead
description: Tech lead for self-service checkout; introduced advanced development practices; new checkout version from scratch deployed to 10,000+ devices.

experience.title: Lead Software Engineer
description: High-load SaaS “The Smart Beer Keg Monitor” for restaurants — hardware/software integration for keg tracking.
Scalable APIs and Android clients; Python Django backend on Kubernetes/Docker Compose.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
description: Air space program for air traffic controllers using C++ Qt5 and Java Swing/Fx/SWT.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
description: Telecommunications R&D; GIS apps with Java Eclipse RCP/RAP, OpenGL, WMS/WFS, PostGIS.
Data center integration: Linux, Windows Server, Hyper-V, cloud.

experience.title: System Network Administrator
description: Linux + PostgreSQL administration; document processes; 120 workstations; DC, DNS, Active Directory, WSUS, GPO.

experience.title: Logistics Analyst
description: Automated MS Excel VBS macros for delivery times; GPS integration for routes and fuel costs.

education.institution: International Institute of Management LINK (former Distance Learning Centre)
Academia de Studii Economice din Moldova

moneyClockMeta.hints: В projectsBundle 10 проектов по местам работы из CV (новые сверху). Суммы projectAmount и поля срока — ориентиры: подставьте реальные договорные цифры. Текущие Napier и SkillTools без даты окончания; завершённые роли с projectEndDate. Режим Project + дата начала даёт автонакопление; Hourly остаётся для ставки вне проектов.
